Routes assistant, user-turn, gateway-injected, and command transcript writes from direct append/event helpers to the session accessor append/publish seam, with a gateway guardrail test update.

PR surface: Source +19, Tests 0. Total +19 across 5 files.

Reproducibility: not applicable. this is a refactor PR, not a bug report with a failing reproduction path. The relevant check is source and runtime behavior preservation for transcript appends and update events.

target.title: refactor: route transcript writers through session seam
target.body:
## What

Path 3 / PR 3.1b transcript writers routes the core transcript writer/append/update helpers through the session accessor seam while preserving the current file-backed transcript behavior. Refs #88838.

## Why

This keeps caller modernization separated from the later SQLite storage flip so the file-backed runtime remains canonical until the 3.1a seam and downstream slices are ready.

## Changes

- Add transcript writer methods to the session accessor
- Route assistant, user, gateway, and command transcript writes
- Preserve lock, idempotency, and event-update behavior
- Cover the writer seam and updated callers in tests

## Testing

- `pnpm exec oxfmt --check src/config/sessions/session-accessor.ts src/config/sessions/session-accessor.test.ts src/config/sessions/transcript.ts src/sessions/user-turn-transcript.ts src/gateway/server-methods/chat-transcript-inject.ts src/agents/command/attempt-execution.ts src/gateway/server-methods/server-methods.test.ts`
- `node scripts/run-oxlint.mjs src/config/sessions/session-accessor.ts src/config/sessions/session-accessor.test.ts src/config/sessions/transcript.ts src/sessions/user-turn-transcript.ts src/gateway/server-methods/chat-transcript-inject.ts src/agents/command/attempt-execution.ts src/gateway/server-methods/server-methods.test.ts`
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/config/sessions/session-accessor.test.ts src/config/sessions/transcript.test.ts src/sessions/user-turn-transcript.test.ts src/gateway/server-methods/server-methods.test.ts src/agents/command/attempt-execution.test.ts` passed with 4 shards / 233 tests
- `pnpm tsgo:core`
- `pnpm tsgo:core:test`
- `git diff --check`
- `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode local` reported no accepted/actionable findings
- Disposable SQLite loop validation: `integration/sqlite-flip-transcript-writers` at `cf006172ec`

Source commit: `3634f8761e8f202103e8f0b33e5c062b9b455544`. The earlier `8a31e28510` source commit is no longer current on this branch.

No blockers. This PR does not add a storage flip, runtime dual-read/fallback, or SQLite schema/store work.
target.author: jalehman
